tests_run.result: Playwright argument forwarding ran full Chromium suite; 21/21 tests passed, including M7 guidance collapse/dismiss/core appointment path and English/zh-CN/system fallback localization tests.
Prettier format check, ESLint, workspace typecheck, and architecture boundary check passed.

acceptance_check.lightweight_dismissible_collapsible_guid: PASS: React local state implements dismiss, restore, and collapse without world-state writes.
acceptance_check.required_guidance_steps: PASS: first objective, select district, inspect district, action preview, observe result, and next-step feedback are present and covered.
acceptance_check.existing_read_models_and_localized_text: PASS: implementation consumes existing ClientReadModelSnapshot/M7 guidance read-model content, selected district state, existing command status, and i18n keys.
acceptance_check.not_full_tutorial_system: PASS: no new tutorial engine, dependency, protocol, save, sim, or content schema was added.
acceptance_check.command_safety_and_cost_visibility: PASS: guidance has no command-submit handler; existing preview/confirm controls remain separate and guidance explicitly preserves visible costs/rejection reasons.
acceptance_check.no_player_only_privilege: PASS: confirmed command copy and existing tests keep standard GameCommand parity; no player-only command path was introduced.
acceptance_check.no_player_mode_debug_leak: PASS: player-mode tests assert no state hash, Prototype District text, raw reason code text, or bare m7 guidance keys in the guidance path.
acceptance_check.localization_coverage: PASS: Storybook stories and Playwright/Vitest coverage include English, zh-CN, and system fallback paths.

scope_check.post_implementation_head_diff: bbbd0fa..HEAD only contains process/QA route state files; no implementation file changed after reviewed_commit.
scope_check.architecture_boundary: PASS: pnpm check architecture boundary check passed; no sim-core/protocol/save/map-renderer/platform/desktop/docs/status/CI forbidden path was touched by reviewed implementation diff.

risks.detail: Writer handoff head_commit and commit fields are null. validate-handoff passes, the route/task metadata names reviewed_commit bbbd0fa, and bbbd0fa is an ancestor of current HEAD; treat as non-blocking metadata defect.
Current branch HEAD is 5b925b6 because a process route commit was added after implementation. QA reviewed implementation diff fd88e5d..bbbd0fa and confirmed bbbd0fa..HEAD is process-only.
Default M7 guidance remains review-aware because upstream content review blockers still exist; this matches task boundary and is not a blocker.
